title: Lost in the Sky
description: Lost in the Sky is an adventure based around preparedness. Careful planning and building are rewarded within progression. Learn to fly before you fall!
body:
# Please Note: 
### Lost in the Sky is currently in early development. Things are changing rapidly, including the addition and deletion of mods, configs, quests, individual and bulk items, and how the pack is "meant to be" played overall. Please be patient while keeping this in mind and feel free to provide feedback in the discord. Thank you!

Lost in the Sky is meant to be an aesthetic building canvas from the deathly heights of a neverending sea of skylands. Progression requires a lot of adventuring, while being up in the sky introduces exciting new challenges and rewards creative thinking.

Based heavily with Create in mind and a lot of add-on mods for it, use Create: Aeronautics to find your way through the skies or across the oceans. Build however and whatever you want, but by prioritizing farms you will be able to progress quickly. The goal is to make living in this world of floating islands as simple as possible... for now.
